name: Rosette Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the eggs, sugar, and salt in a bowl; beat well.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the bowl; beat until smooth.
3. Heat the rosette iron in deep, hot oil (375°F) for 2 minutes.
4. Drain excess oil from the iron, then dip it into the batter about 1/4 inch from the top of the iron.
5. Immediately dip the iron back into the hot oil (375°F).
6. Fry the rosette until golden brown, approximately 1/2 minute.
7. Lift the rosette out and turn it upside down to drain excess oil.
8. Use a fork to push the rosette off the iron onto a rack placed over paper towels.
9. Reheat the iron for 1 minute before making the next rosette.
10. Sprinkle the rosettes with confectioners' sugar. Makes 5 1/2 dozen.
